routes.contacts module¶

Contacts Routes Module¶

This module defines the API endpoints for managing contacts, including creation, retrieval with filtering, updating, and deletion. All operations are scoped to the currently authenticated user.

routes.contacts.create_contact(body: ContactCreate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<bound method Auth.get_current_user of <services.auth.Auth object>>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Creates a new contact for the authenticated user.

Parameters:

  • body (ContactCreate) – The data for the new contact.

  • db (Session) – The database session.

  • current_user (User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

The newly created contact.

Return type:

ContactResponse

routes.contacts.delete_contact(contact_id: int, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<bound method Auth.get_current_user of <services.auth.Auth object>>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Deletes a specific contact from the database.

Parameters:

  • contact_id (int) – The ID of the contact to delete.

  • db (Session) – The database session.

  • current_user (User) – The currently authenticated user.

Raises:

HTTPException – 404 if the contact is not found.

Returns:

None (HTTP 204 status code).

Return type:

None

routes.contacts.read_contact(contact_id: int, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<bound method Auth.get_current_user of <services.auth.Auth object>>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Retrieves a specific contact by its unique ID.

Parameters:

  • contact_id (int) – The ID of the contact to retrieve.

  • db (Session) – The database session.

  • current_user (User) – The currently authenticated user.

Raises:

HTTPException – 404 if the contact is not found or doesn’t belong to the user.

Returns:

The requested contact.

Return type:

ContactResponse

routes.contacts.read_contacts(name: str = Query(None), last_name: str = Query(None), email: str = Query(None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<bound method Auth.get_current_user of <services.auth.Auth object>>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Retrieves a list of contacts for the authenticated user.

Supports optional filtering by first name, last name, or email.

Parameters:

  • name (str) – Filter contacts by first name (optional).

  • last_name (str) – Filter contacts by last name (optional).

  • email (str) – Filter contacts by email (optional).

  • db (Session) – The database session.

  • current_user (User) – The currently authenticated user.

Returns:

A list of contacts matching the search criteria.

Return type:

List[ContactResponse]

routes.contacts.update_contact(contact_id: int, body: ContactUpdate, db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None), current_user: User = Depends(dependency=<bound method Auth.get_current_user of <services.auth.Auth object>>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Updates the information of an existing contact.

Parameters:

  • contact_id (int) – The ID of the contact to update.

  • body (ContactUpdate) – The updated data for the contact.

  • db (Session) – The database session.

  • current_user (User) – The currently authenticated user.

Raises:

HTTPException – 404 if the contact is not found.

Returns:

The updated contact.

Return type:

ContactResponse
